user.title: HCalory BLE
user.description: Connect to the HCalory BLE daemon. If you use the add-on, enter the heater address and leave the socket path empty. The default socket directory is {default_socket_dir}.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the daemon socket
error.missing_socket: Enter either a socket path or a Bluetooth address

abort.already_configured: This daemon socket is already configured
